violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -No sanitizer solution made up/ready to use during service.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Used dish cloth to wipe prep table.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Far right side top of prep table found with chicken at 47-51F. *Directed to close lid, chicken had lowered to 46F before departure. *Also recommend staff try to close gap between containers.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -2 spice containers at make line have residue build up on surfaces.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer dispenser does not appear to be working correctly. First "fresh" solution found at less than 150ppm. Removed and reattached lid to bulk sanitizer, made new "fresh" sink solution and found at ~150ppm Quat. *Recommend having unit recalibrated/serviced to ensure consistent solutions. Check in-use solutions frequently to ensure they are maintinaed at 150-400ppm Quat solution (per label instruction).
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop left in bottom of mop sink basin.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Open case of thin crust pizza in walk in cooler was left open/exposed.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
